DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One may be inoperative provided there are no fuel leaks.

Para.rev:revHighlight: Added the missing AMM DDG reference.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Immediately after refuel operations, inspect the area around the associated refuel adapter and verify fuel leaks are not present (AMM DDG 28-21-02).

Note.Para: Dispatch is not allowed for an inoperative poppet valve. A poppet valve is not operating normally if it leaks immediately after refueling.
This item is applicable to failures of the refuel/defuel handle, break-away flange, a break-away flange that is beyond wear limits, or a refuel adapter that has failed the bonding resistance check.
An inoperative adapter should not be used in refuel or defuel operations.
